docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF MAR-19-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ENROTH ERIC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARDOIN RICHARD A. ARDOIN SHARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENROTH ERIC $1,729.00 PRINCIPAL, $98.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,827.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY ARDOIN RICHARD A. ARDOIN SHARON MEYER JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT ENROTH ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ENROTH ERIC
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ENROTH ERIC
